title: Lateralus EoE
wikitext:
[]: Lateralus + EoE?             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Mon Sep 08, 2008 7:20 pm I was watching an AMV called "The Schismic End of Evangelion" on youtube, and one of the comments said that the movie actually syncs perfectly to the album Lateralus by Tool. Can anyone confirm/deny this before I try it? I wouldn't put it past Maynard James Keenan to do something like this, since (if I'm not mistaken) he's a total otaku. Plus I need to rewatch EoE anyways, and this is a perfect excuse to do it.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Mon Sep 08, 2008 8:55 pm I am going to deny it. There are tons of people that say that album goes with various of things. Take that notion with a grain of salt.

[]:             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Mon Sep 08, 2008 9:01 pm Yeah... I tried the opening company logos, and they sync pretty well to the first few minutes of the album. Going to try the rest when I get a chance tomorrow. I'm betting it doesn't work, but who knows. (I didn't know Sega sponsored EoE. )

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Sep 09, 2008 6:58 am SeanTucker wrote: (I didn't know Sega sponsored EoE. )

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Sep 09, 2008 2:38 pm The Horakis are retro gamers.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Sep 09, 2008 4:35 pm Reichu wrote: The Horakis are retro gamers.

[]:             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Tue Sep 09, 2008 4:37 pm I haven't seen the series in a year or so, need to rewatch. Same with EoE (as already mentioned), except it's really more of a first watch as I was half-asleep the first time through; most of my knowlege about the story's intricacies comes from here and Wikipedia.

[]:             Quote Post by AyrYntake » Wed Sep 10, 2008 8:59 am In any case, what are the chances that Anno made EoE to sync with Lateralus? Even if it works, I doubt that it's much more than coincidence.

[]:             Quote Post by p06 » Wed Sep 10, 2008 10:06 am AyrYntake wrote: In any case, what are the chances that Anno made EoE to sync with Lateralus? Even if it works, I doubt that it's much more than coincidence.

[]:             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Wed Sep 10, 2008 3:49 pm Yeah, Lateralus having an intentional synch with EoE is not terribly far-fetched.

[]:             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Thu Sep 11, 2008 9:37 pm Uh... is EoE supposed to have a live-action sequence before the movie starts? If so, then I need to pirate a new copy to do the sync correctly. (I refuse to support Mangle's shitty non-Renewal DVD.)

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Thu Sep 11, 2008 10:20 pm It is on Youtube somewhere, I am 100% sure of it, but couldn't tell you where to find it, I forgot.

[]:             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Thu Sep 11, 2008 10:28 pm I found, like, the first 10 minutes and the MP Eva fight. Used the first 10min clip to help sync my copy to the album (first scene after the opening credits begins at 2:59 in the song The Grudge). The sync between the MP Eva fight and Ticks and Leeches is creepy for like the first 4 minutes, then it kinda falls apart. In the first half of the song, the screams are perfectly synced to Asuka's battle cries. EDIT: It gets creepy again at 6:30 in or so. The screams start syncing to the MPEvas' "caws" instead. EDIT2: The syncing falls apart after 25' ends, but that may be my copy, not the sync; my copy has the credits with Thanatos playing in the background at the end of 25' as well as 26', and it's split into two parts.
